word: G1747 - ἐνέδρα - enédra - en-ed'-rah - Lay wait

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐνέδρα

- Transliteration: Enedra

- Phonetic: en-ed'-rah

- Definition:

1. a lying in wait, an ambush

- Origin: from G1722 and the base of G1476

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Feminine from G1722 and the base of G1476; an ambuscade that is (figuratively) murderous purpose: - lay wait. See also G1749.
